017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
032
033/**
034 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link BsonParser}.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
041 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/BsonBasics">BSON Basics</a>
042 * </ul>
043 */
044@SuppressWarnings({
045   "rawtypes",
046   "unchecked",
047   "java:S115",
048   "java:S125",  // Explanatory comments contain BSON/JSON syntax (e.g. {"value":x}) that Sonar misreads as commented-out code
049   "java:S3776",
050   "java:S6541",
051   "resource"    // RecordReader returned by RecordAdapter is a Closeable owned by the caller; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
052})
053public class BsonParserSession extends InputStreamParserSession implements RecordReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
054
055   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
056   private static final String BSON_VALUE_KEY = "value";
057
058   /**
059    * Builder class.
060    */
061   public static class Builder extends InputStreamParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
062
063      private final String nullKeyString;
064      private final int maxLength;
065
066      /**
067       * Constructor
068       *
069       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
070       */
071      protected Builder(BsonParser ctx) {
072         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
073         nullKeyString = ctx.getNullKeyString();
074         maxLength = ctx.getMaxLength();
075      }
076
077      @Override
078      public BsonParserSession build() {
079         return new BsonParserSession(this);
080      }
081   }
082
083   /**
084    * Creates a new builder for a {@link BsonParserSession}.
085    *
086    * @param ctx The BSON parser context creating this session.
087    * @return A new builder.
088    */
089   public static Builder create(BsonParser ctx) {
090      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
091   }
092
093   private final String nullKeyString;
094   private final int maxLength;
095
096   protected BsonParserSession(Builder builder) {
097      super(builder);
098      nullKeyString = builder.nullKeyString;
099      maxLength = builder.maxLength;
100   }
101
102   private String trimKey(String name) {
103      return isTrimStrings() && nn(name) ? name.trim() : name;
104   }
105
106   private Object readTypedValue(BsonInputStream is, int elementType, ClassMeta<?> targetType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
107      Object o = switch (elementType) {
108         case 0x01 -> is.readDouble();
109         case 0x02 -> trim(is.readString());
110         case 0x03 -> parseDocument(is, targetType, outer, pMeta);
111         case 0x04 -> parseArray(is, targetType, outer, pMeta);
112         case 0x05 -> is.readBinary();
113         case 0x07 -> is.readObjectId();
114         case 0x08 -> is.readBoolean();
115         case 0x09 -> is.readDateTime();
116         case 0x0A -> null;
117         case 0x10 -> is.readInt32();
118         case 0x12 -> is.readInt64();
119         case 0x13 -> is.readDecimal128();
120         default -> {
121            is.skipValue(elementType);
122            yield null;
123         }
124      };
125      if (nn(outer) && nn(o))
126         setParent(targetType, o, outer);
127      return o;
128   }
129
130   private <T> T parseDocument(BsonInputStream is, ClassMeta<?> eType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
131      is.readDocumentSize();
132      if (eType == null)
133         eType = object();
134
135      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
136      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
137      ClassMeta<?> sType;
138      if (nn(builder))
139         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
140      else if (nn(swap))
141         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
142      else
143         sType = eType;
144
145      // Do not recurse for Optional here - BSON wraps non-bean/map roots as {"value":x}.
146      // We must parse the document first, then unwrap via the map.size()==1 / "value" path below.
147      var wrapInOptional = eType.isOptional();
148      if (sType.isOptional())
149         sType = eType.getElementType();
150
151      setCurrentClass(sType);
152
153      Object result;
154      // Skip map path for Optional - we need fallback to unwrap {"value":x}
155      if (!eType.isOptional() && sType.isMap()) {
156         var map = sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType);
157         // Coerce string keys to the declared key type when non-String (e.g. Map<TestEnum,String>)
158         // so map.get(EnumConstant) works (Bug #7b).  Matches the JSON-family parseIntoMap2 pattern.
159         var keyType = sType.getKeyType();
160         var coerceKeys = nn(keyType) && !keyType.isObject() && !keyType.isString();
161         while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
162            var et = is.readElementType();
163            var name = is.readElementName();
164            var key = name.equals(nullKeyString) ? null : trimKey(name);
165            var value = readTypedValue(is, et, sType.getValueType(), map, pMeta);
166            setName(sType.getValueType(), value, key);
167            var resolvedKey = coerceKeys ? convertAttrToType(map, key, keyType) : key;
168            map.put(resolvedKey, value);
169         }
170         is.readDocumentTerminator();
171         var raw = map instanceof MarshalledMap mm ? cast(mm, pMeta, eType) : map;
172         // Convert JsonMap to target map type (TreeMap, LinkedHashMap, etc.) when needed
173         if (eType.isMap() && raw instanceof Map mr && !eType.inner().isInstance(raw))
174            result = convertToMemberType(null, mr, eType);
175         else
176            result = raw;
177      } else if (!eType.isOptional() && (nn(builder) || sType.canCreateNewBean(outer))) {
178         var beanMap = builder == null ? newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()) : toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
179         while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
180            var et = is.readElementType();
181            var name = is.readElementName();
182            var key = trimKey(name);
183            var bpm = beanMap.getPropertyMeta(key);
184            Object value;
185            if (name.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType))) {
186               value = readTypedValue(is, et, string(), null, null);
187               if (nn(value))
188                  beanMap = applyTypeProperty(beanMap, value.toString(), eType);
189            } else if (bpm != null) {
190               var bcm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanInfo();
191               value = readTypedValue(is, et, bcm, beanMap.getBean(false), bpm);
192               setName(bcm, value, key);
193               try {
194                  bpm.set(beanMap, key, value);
195               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
196                  onBeanSetterException(nn(pMeta) ? pMeta : bpm, e);
197                  throw e;
198               }
199            } else {
200               onUnknownProperty(key, beanMap, readTypedValue(is, et, object(), null, null));
201            }
202         }
203         is.readDocumentTerminator();
204         result = builder == null ? beanMap.getBean() : builder.build(this, beanMap.getBean(), eType);
205      } else {
206         // Fallback: read document elements. Handles scalar, array, Optional roots (all wrapped as {"value":x}).
207         // Do NOT call parseArray here - at root the next bytes are type+name of first element, not array doc.
208         var map = newGenericMap();
209         while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
210            var et = is.readElementType();
211            var name = is.readElementName();
212            var key = name.equals(nullKeyString) ? null : trimKey(name);
213         map.put(key, readTypedValue(is, et, BSON_VALUE_KEY.equals(name) ? eType : object(), map, null));
214      }
215      is.readDocumentTerminator();
216      // Unwrap {"value":x} when target is Optional or when scalar-like (BSON root wrap convention)
217      if (map.size() == 1 && map.containsKey(BSON_VALUE_KEY)) {
218         var wrapped = map.get(BSON_VALUE_KEY);
219            if (eType.isOptional() || (!sType.isMap() && !sType.isBean() && !sType.isObject())
220               || (wrapped == null && sType.isObject())) {
221               result = convertToMemberType(null, wrapped, eType);
222               if (eType.isOptional())
223                  wrapInOptional = false; // convertToMemberType already wrapped
224            } else {
225               var castResult = cast(map, pMeta, eType);
226               result = (eType.isMap() && castResult instanceof Map && !eType.inner().isInstance(castResult))
227                  ? convertToMemberType(null, castResult, eType) : castResult;
228            }
229         } else {
230            var castResult = cast(map, pMeta, eType);
231            result = (eType.isMap() && castResult instanceof Map && !eType.inner().isInstance(castResult))
232               ? convertToMemberType(null, castResult, eType) : castResult;
233         }
234      }
235      // Final fallback: when target is Optional and we have map with "value", unwrap
236      if (eType.isOptional() && result instanceof Map m && m.size() == 1 && m.containsKey(BSON_VALUE_KEY)) {
237         result = convertToMemberType(null, m.get(BSON_VALUE_KEY), eType);
238         wrapInOptional = false; // convertToMemberType already wrapped
239      }
240      // Convert JsonMap to target Map type (TreeMap, LinkedHashMap, etc.) when needed
241      if (eType.isMap() && result instanceof Map m2 && !eType.inner().isInstance(result))
242         result = convertToMemberType(null, m2, eType);
243      // Unswap when result is in swapped form (e.g. JsonMap for bean with Map swap, String for Class).
244      // Skip when convertToMemberType already produced normal form (e.g. Class from String).
245      if (nn(swap) && nn(result) && swap.isSwappedObject(result))
246         result = unswap(swap, result, eType);
247      return (T)(wrapInOptional ? opt(result) : result);
248   }
249
250   private BeanMap<?> applyTypeProperty(BeanMap<?> beanMap, String typeName, ClassMeta<?> eType) throws ExecutableException {
251      var cm = getBeanRegistry().getClassMeta(typeName);
252      if (nn(cm) && nn(eType) && eType.isAssignableFrom(cm))
253         return toBeanMap(newBean(cm.inner()));
254      return beanMap;
255   }
256
257   @SuppressWarnings({
258      "unused",    // pMeta kept for API consistency with other parseXxx methods
259      "java:S1172" // Same as above
260   })
261   private Object parseArray(BsonInputStream is, ClassMeta<?> eType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
262      is.readDocumentSize();
263      if (eType == null)
264         eType = object();
265
266      var sType = eType;
267      // Do not recurse for Optional - parse array elements with inner type, wrap at end
268      if (sType.isOptional())
269         sType = eType.getElementType();
270
271      // Array types (String[], int[][], etc.) must use a Collection to gather elements; toArray() converts at the end.
272      // ClassMeta.newInstance() for array types returns an empty array, not a Collection - never use it for arrays.
273      // Only use sType.newInstance() for actual Collection types (List, Set, etc.).
274      Collection coll;
275      if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs() || sType.inner().isArray())
276         coll = newGenericList();
277      else {
278         var instance = sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? sType.newInstance(outer) : null;
279         coll = (instance instanceof Collection c) ? c : newGenericList();
280      }
281      var elementType = def(sType.getElementType(), object());
282
283      while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
284         var et = is.readElementType();
285         is.readElementName();
286         coll.add(readTypedValue(is, et, elementType, coll, null));
287      }
288      is.readDocumentTerminator();
289
290      Object result = sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs() ? toArray(sType, coll) : coll;
291      return eType.isOptional() ? opt(result) : result;
292   }
293
294   @Override
295   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
296      try (var is = new BsonInputStream(pipe)) {
297         is.setMaxLength(maxLength);
298         return (T)parseDocument(is, type, getOuter(), null);
299      }
300   }
301
302   /**
303    * Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over a BSON document, bound to this live session.
304    * {@link RecordReader#read(Class) read(...)} delegates to the polymorphic
305    * {@link ParserSession#parse(Object, Class)} entry point.
306    *
307    * @param input The input.
308    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
309    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
310    */
311   @Override /* RecordReadable */
312   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
313      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
314   }
315
316   /**
317    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} for BSON, bound to this live session.  Calls
318    * {@code parse(input, List.class, Object.class)} once and iterates the result.
319    *
320    * @param input The input.
321    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
322    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
323    */
324   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
325   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
326      return RecordAdapter.arrayReader(this, input);
327   }
328
329   /**
330    * The BSON record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
331    *
332    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
333    */
334   @Override /* RecordReadable */
335   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
336
337   /**
338    * The BSON array-record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
339    *
340    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
341    */
342   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
343   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
344}
